title: Singapore business-dossier diligence edge cases
legalEthicalCriteria: Use synthetic entities unless the case refers only to a public agency, registry boundary, or official dataset behavior.
Do not label a company or person as fraudulent, sanctioned, criminal, insolvent, or non-compliant without official public evidence.
Treat missing public evidence as a gap or lookup limitation, not as negative evidence.
Require provenance, freshness, gaps, and limits to remain visible in every benchmarked dossier.
Benchmark outputs are for product quality and regression testing, not legal, tax, credit, or licensed compliance advice.
falsePositiveLimitations: Name similarity can over-match common company names when no UEN is supplied.
Expired licence fixtures can be stale if upstream date formats change.
Sector hints can select modules that are irrelevant to a diversified entity.
falseNegativeLimitations: Public-only datasets may omit licensed, paid, private, or authentication-gated records.
Fresh upstream outages can look like no coverage unless source-unavailable gaps are preserved.
A correct UEN with outdated public records can still miss recent status changes.

cases.title: Exact UEN resolves live ACRA entity only
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Do not infer sector risk from skipped modules.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: ACRA-only evidence may miss sector-specific licences.

cases.title: Entity-name search returns no ACRA match
expectedGaps: No exact match gap or no-match rationale
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Do not claim the entity does not exist outside public data.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A real company with a very different registered name could be missed.

cases.title: Inactive ACRA status creates high risk flag
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Status wording must come from ACRA, not name heuristics.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Recent reinstatement may not be reflected until upstream refreshes.

cases.title: Construction sector selects BCA after ACRA identity
cases.falsePositiveNotes: BCA no-match should not mean the company is unlicensed for every activity.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: BCA records may use a related registered entity name.

cases.title: Expired BCA licensed-builder record
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Only flag dates that parse as earlier than run date.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Unparseable expiry formats can suppress the flag.

cases.title: Expired BCA registered-contractor record
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Expired contractor registration does not imply all BCA credentials are expired.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A separate active licence can exist in another BCA dataset.

cases.title: BCA class-code lookup without entity name
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Class-code result sets should not be presented as one counterparty match.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Class-code searches can miss contractors indexed only by workhead or grade.

cases.title: BCA selected but lacks search inputs
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Unsearched BCA should not become a no-match risk flag.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Without an entity or class input, the dossier cannot test BCA coverage.

cases.title: Real-estate salesperson registration search
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Do not merge salespersons with agencies unless identifiers match.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Expired or renamed salesperson records may require direct CEA follow-up.

cases.title: CEA selected from sector hint but no CEA identifiers
expectedEvidence: CEA moduleReason explains missing CEA lookup input
expectedGaps: missing salesperson or estate-agent identifier follow-up
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Missing CEA search should not imply unlicensed real-estate activity.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Entity name alone may be insufficient for CEA data.

cases.title: Estate-agent licence search
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Licence match should not be generalized to all related salespersons.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Licence number formatting differences can cause misses.

cases.title: GeBIZ procurement supplier selected by sector
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Tender award history is not a complete revenue or customer record.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Supplier names can vary across GeBIZ awards.

cases.title: GeBIZ no-match after explicit module
cases.falsePositiveNotes: No GeBIZ rows should not imply no government work through subcontracting.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Awards can be recorded under a group or former name.

cases.title: BOA architecture firm exact name
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Firm match should not imply individual architect registration status.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Firm names can contain punctuation or partnership suffix variants.

cases.title: BOA individual registration search
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Individual registration should not be treated as company registration.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Registration-number prefix changes can reduce recall.

cases.title: Healthcare sector selects HSA
cases.falsePositiveNotes: HSA match should not imply all products are covered.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Some health-sector activities may sit outside HSA datasets.

cases.title: Expired HSA health-product licence

input.entityName: SYNTHETIC EXPIRED HSA LICENSEE PTE LTD

cases.falsePositiveNotes: Only expired licences in returned rows should be flagged.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Null expiry dates can suppress expiry checks.

cases.title: Licensed pharmacy with no product-licensee rows
cases.falsePositiveNotes: No product licence does not mean no pharmacy licence.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Pharmacy and product-licensee data can use different names.

cases.title: Hospitality sector selects HLB
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Hotel keeper match is not a full hospitality licensing opinion.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A hotel can be listed under trading name rather than legal entity.

cases.title: HLB selected but entity name absent
expectedGaps: missing entity or keeper name follow-up
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Unsearched HLB is not a no-match.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: No hotel evidence can be generated without a name input.

cases.title: ACRA SSIC infers construction module
expectedEvidence: BCA selected when no explicit module constraint exists
cases.falsePositiveNotes: SSIC inference should be visible, not hidden as user intent.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Generic SSIC text may not map to all relevant modules.

cases.title: Explicit modules constrain inferred sector
expectedEvidence: sector-inferred modules skipped with explicit-scope note
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Skipped inferred modules should not appear searched.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A user can intentionally miss relevant sector modules by constraining scope.

cases.title: Partial module coverage with ACRA match and BCA no match
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Partial coverage should not become high severity by default.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A BCA match under a different name can be missed.

cases.title: No module matches after explicit sector module

input.entityName: SYNTHETIC NO MODULE MATCHES PTE LTD

cases.falsePositiveNotes: No matches should not imply the entity is invalid outside selected scope.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Only searched modules contribute to this flag.

cases.title: Cross-source name divergence
expectedEvidence: ACRA and sector names in message
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Legitimate brand or branch naming can diverge from legal names.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Aggressive normalization can hide meaningful name differences.

cases.title: Case-insensitive UEN normalization
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Only normalize valid UEN formats.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Malformed UENs should not be silently corrected beyond case.

cases.title: Malformed UEN treated as entity name
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Do not display malformed strings as validated UENs.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Users may need validation guidance for mistyped UENs.

cases.title: Common-name fuzzy collision
expectedEvidence: matchConfidence exposes fuzzy or no-match rationale
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Common names are prone to over-matching without UEN.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Strict exact matching can miss punctuation variants.

cases.title: Punctuation variant entity name
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Normalization should not erase materially different words.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Overly strict punctuation handling can miss valid matches.

cases.title: Multiple sector hints select multiple modules
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Multiple module selection can produce irrelevant no-matches.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Unlisted sectors still remain outside scope.

cases.title: Source unavailable gap preserved
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Upstream failure should not be counted as no official match.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A transient outage can hide real records.

cases.title: Freshness timestamp carried per source
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Observed time is not the same as upstream update time.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Sources without upstream timestamps rely on observedAt only.

cases.title: Provenance source URL appears for searched module
cases.falsePositiveNotes: A configured URL is provenance context, not an endorsement.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Some sources can lack deep-link source URLs.

cases.title: Next checks generated for selected construction module

input.entityName: SYNTHETIC NEXT CHECKS BUILDER PTE LTD

cases.falsePositiveNotes: Next checks are recommended follow-ups, not completed evidence.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Missing entity name prevents specific next checks.

cases.title: Handoff markdown preserves matched and unmatched counts
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Markdown summary should not replace structured records.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A missing handoff block can reduce analyst reproducibility.

cases.title: Quality confidence low when no searchable module qualifies
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Low confidence from missing input is not a risk finding by itself.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Users need actionable inputs to improve confidence.

cases.title: Quality confidence high for exact ACRA UEN
cases.falsePositiveNotes: High identity confidence does not mean broad sector coverage.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Exact ACRA match can still omit paid/private records.

cases.title: Risk rules version exposed in quality record
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Rule version metadata should not be interpreted as rule pass/fail.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Exports without quality records lose rule-version traceability.

cases.title: ACRA officer count retained without officer graph inference
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Officer count must not become an ownership or control claim.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: No graph inference means relationship risks can be missed.

cases.title: Selected module scope shown in limits
expectedEvidence: PUBLIC_REGISTRY_SCOPE limit lists acra and gebiz
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Scope text should not suggest all Singapore registries were searched.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Explicit scope can hide relevant modules.

cases.title: Bulk dossier row preserves upstream failure
expectedEvidence: bulk row status error or upstreamFailure true
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Failed rows should not be counted as no-match rows.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Bulk summaries can hide detailed per-source errors if not expanded.

cases.title: Bulk dossier row summarizes high risk
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Bulk risk inherits rule limits from the source dossier.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Bulk row fields are summaries and require dossier drill-down.

cases.title: Export manifest contains dossier hash
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Manifest signature is local integrity evidence only.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: CSV-only exports cannot fully verify payload content without matching JSON.

cases.title: Analyst memo receives public-data limits
expectedEvidence: memo includes limits or gap caveats
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Generated memo must not upgrade public-data signals into legal advice.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Memo unavailable states must preserve underlying dossier evidence.

cases.title: Skipped module follow-up is actionable
expectedGaps: sector context or extra identifier needed
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Skipped modules should remain neutral.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Without follow-up input the module cannot be rerun.

cases.title: Real-estate follow-up rerun with CEA identifier
expectedEvidence: new dossier preserves provenance and freshness
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Rerun evidence should replace stale module state only after completion.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Invalid CEA identifier can still produce no match.

cases.title: Country-pack boundary keeps SG contract intact
expectedEvidence: SG tools do not fabricate MY data
expectedGaps: paid or gated Malaysia source boundary
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Country skeletons should not imply full production coverage.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Public-only country packs may miss registry truth behind paid portals.

cases.title: PDPA-safe handling of saved shortlist summary
expectedEvidence: saved summary excludes raw unrelated records
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Shortlist presence is user workflow state, not diligence evidence.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Summaries omit detailed row-level evidence by design.

cases.title: Browser-extension UEN overlay is click-triggered only

input.browserText: Synthetic supplier 198800049X appears in page text.

expectedEvidence: no network call before user interaction
cases.falsePositiveNotes: UEN-like strings in unrelated text can be highlighted.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: Obfuscated or image-only UENs are outside content-script scope.

cases.title: Public benchmark page cites benchmark fixture count
cases.falsePositiveNotes: Status pages are operational evidence, not source-data certification.
cases.falseNegativeNotes: A passing fixture-count check does not prove every live source is available.
